summary: Comprehensive testing of 'The Invisible Agent' trade tracker new features completed successfully. All backend APIs working at 100% success rate. Frontend testing confirmed all new features are functional including Reports page with FY selector and CSV export, Analytics page with 5 tabs and FY filtering, Close Trade dialog with claims input and notes, Best Customer leaderboard, and Claims Analysis with FY comparison.

minor_ui_issues.issue: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1, but charts still render correctly

passed_tests: Demo user authentication (JWT-based login)
Commission Report API with FY parameter (GET /api/reports/commission?fy=2025)
Commission Report default FY (GET /api/reports/commission)
CSV Export functionality (GET /api/reports/commission/export?fy=2025)
Suppliers Analytics with FY filtering (GET /api/analytics/suppliers?fy=2025)
Customers Analytics with FY filtering (GET /api/analytics/customers?fy=2025)
Best Customers API (GET /api/analytics/best-customers?fy=2025)
Claims Analysis API with trend comparison (GET /api/analytics/claims?fy=2025)
Cash Flow Analytics (GET /api/analytics/cashflow)
Close Trade endpoint (PUT /api/trades/{id}/close)
Trade closure verification and status update
Dashboard Summary and Heatmap endpoints
Reports page loads with FY selector and monthly chart
CSV export button present and functional
Analytics page has all 5 tabs (Suppliers, Trust Scores, Best Customers, Claims, Cash Flow)
FY selector on Analytics page filters data correctly
Close Trade option appears in trade dropdown menu for active trades
Close Trade dialog shows claims input and notes textarea
Close Trade form can be filled and submitted/canceled
Existing anytime Add Claim feature still works in dropdown
All trade status badges display correctly (active/completed)
Trade commission and cash collection values display properly

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major functionality working, minor chart console warnings only
